summary: Frontend testing for 15 standalone pages benchmark redesign - ALL PASSING. Batch 1 (8 pages): experience-centre, about, process, amc-packages, consultation, faq, work-with-us, testimonials. Batch 2 (7 pages): contact, support, investment-pricing, warranty, certification-standard, media, partner-with-us. All pages render correctly with dark hero sections, gold (#C9A962) accents, proper data-testid attributes, and unified design patterns.

minor.issue: 503 error during initial load (hydration warning) but page recovered and rendered correctly

issues: Minor: LCP image warning - recommend adding priority property to main image

elements_verified: 5 phases (01-05): Discovery, Design, Installation, Programming, Training
3 tiers: Basic Care, Professional Care, Enterprise Care
3 consultation types: Free Site Visit, Experience Center Tour, Video Consultation
Expandable job cards with Apply Now buttons
Contact form with all fields (name, email, phone, subject, message)
Coverage items: Premium Brands, Installation Work, Cabling & Infrastructure, Programming & Config
6 engineering standards: Installation Standards, QA Checklist, AMC Framework, Documentation Standard, Training Process, Handover Process
4 partner types: Authorized Dealer, Regional Distributor, System Integrator, MEP Contractor

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 standalone pages redesigned with benchmark design system verified: experience-centre, about, process, amc-packages, consultation, faq, work-with-us, testimonials, contact, support, investment-pricing, warranty, certification-standard, media, partner-with-us. All pages use dark hero sections (bg-gray-900), gold accents (#C9A962), consistent section spacing, and unified CTA patterns. Pages with API integration (faq, testimonials) load data correctly. Booking modals on consultation and experience-centre pages work. Combined with previous iterations (27, 28), all benchmark redesign pages across the app are verified working.
